privileged_info_summary: The 'detect_port_scan_recon' task uses synthetic packet capture data generated during task setup, not real-world data. The capture is saved to /home/ga/Documents/captures/recon_investigation.pcapng and contains a simulated SYN port scan from IP 192.168.50.10 to 192.168.50.20, probing ports 1-100 plus 443 and 8080. Four ports (22, 53, 443, 8080) are configured as open on the target, generating SYN-ACK responses. Background HTTP traffic is generated between the same IPs on port 8080 using curl. The expected forensic report should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/scan_forensic_report.txt.
